title: Pan-Seared Turnip Hash
description: A crispy and flavorful turnip hash, perfect as a side dish or snack. The peppery flavor of the turnips pairs well with the tender french fries.
instructions: 1. Peel and dice the turnips into 1-inch pieces.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the turnips to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they start to brown.
4. Add the French fries and hash browns to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
5. Season with salt and peppercorns to taste.
